---
name: Feature request
about: A new strategy, tax rule, broker, or framework capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What are you trying to do**
The use case — what decision or analysis this would enable.

**Proposed feature**
What you'd like Kontor to do.

**Scope check (optional)**
If this touches the German tax model (e.g. Vorabpauschale, Kirchensteuer) or a
new broker mapping, note the rule/source so the modelling can be verified.

**Alternatives considered**
Anything you've tried or ruled out.
